name: bird-pp-mcp
description: A terminal-native CLI for Bird's Conversations and SMS APIs, with offline search, batch reconcile, and a local SQLite mirror nobody else ships.

bird_api_key.title: BIRD_API_KEY
bird_api_key.description:
Bird uses an Access Key passed in the Authorization header. Generate one at
https://app.bird.com/settings/security/access-keys and export it as BIRD_API_KEY.

bird_workspace_id.title: BIRD_WORKSPACE_ID
bird_workspace_id.description: Sets BIRD_WORKSPACE_ID for the endpoint template variable {workspace_id}.
